title: [v5.2] nc -p considered harmful
body:
Clean backport of #23310 

nmap-ncat has been downgraded on Fedora, to 7.92.
nc -l -p PORT requires 7.95. Switch to nc -l ADDR PORT.


```release-note
Fixes broken gating tests
```
